issues.description: Missing first effect entirely. Card has two effects: (1) '[Opponent's Turn] All of your {Navy} or {Punk Hazard} type Characters gain +1000 power' and (2) '[Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] If you have a Character with 7000 power or more, set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active.' Only the second effect is partially represented.
Trigger should be 'Activated' (correct), but missing 'MainPhase' context or should have cost/timing constraints. The effect should specify [Activate: Main] and [Once Per Turn].
Condition is 'Always' but should be 'HasCardOnBoard' or similar to check 'If you have a Character with 7000 power or more'. Current condition does not enforce the power requirement.
Action type 'GiveDon' is incorrect. Should be 'AttachDon' to 'set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active' (attach/activate DON cards).
Missing target specification. Should specify that DON cards are being set active from hand/deck, and should include 'count':2 with 'max':true or 'upTo':true modifier.
